title: boehmeria manipurensis
intro: Boehmeria manipurensis, also known as Manipuri nettle or Indian nettle, is a plant species in the family Urticaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Boehmeria manipurensis include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Boehmeria manipurensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
